metadata.description: Scalekit Auth Stack for GitHub Copilot — AgentKit and SaaSKit plugins.

plugins.name: agentkit
plugins.description: Authentication for AI agents. OAuth flows, token vault, 40+ connectors (Gmail, Slack, Salesforce, etc.), tool discovery, and live testing — so agents can act on behalf of users.

plugins.name: saaskit
plugins.description: Production-ready auth for B2B SaaS apps. Login, sessions, SSO (Okta, Azure AD, Google), SCIM provisioning, RBAC, MCP server auth, and API key management.

plugins.name: agent-auth
plugins.description: Alias for agentkit — AI agent authentication with OAuth flows, token vault, and 40+ connectors.

plugins.name: mcp-auth
plugins.description: Alias for saaskit — includes OAuth 2.1 for MCP servers alongside login, SSO, SCIM, and RBAC.

plugins.name: full-stack-auth
plugins.description: Alias for saaskit — full-stack authentication including login, sessions, SSO, SCIM, and RBAC.

plugins.name: modular-sso
plugins.description: Alias for saaskit — enterprise SSO is now part of the unified SaaSKit plugin.

plugins.name: modular-scim
plugins.description: Alias for saaskit — SCIM provisioning is now part of the unified SaaSKit plugin.
